content: canonrebel04/android-ai-app is a spec-only repo for an Android AI agent with Rust core, JNI bridge, AccessibilityService, OpenRouter routing, skills plugin system, and Telegram/WhatsApp/Voice channels.
When a GitHub repo has no code files (spec/docs only), skip the obsidian-github-docgen crawler and manually extract structured notes from markdown into Obsidian.

canonrebel04/swarm is a 522-file Python multi-agent orchestration TUI with role-locking, YAML contracts, skill registry, tool policy enforcement, filesystem guards, and anti-drift detection. Key reusable patterns for android-ai-agent: policy enforcer, permission guard, identity anchoring, event-driven state machine, YAML+Markdown skill definitions.

android-ai-agent Phase 1 Rust core: 13 source files, 13 tests, 13 git commits. Modules: http_client, complexity_classifier, model_router (4 tiers), context_manager, tool_parser, skill_registry (TOML), provider/ (OpenRouter live + 4 stubs). Edition 2021, tokio 1.52, reqwest 0.13, serde 1.0, serde_json pinned 1.0.140 for Android compat.

android-ai-agent Phase 2: safety layer (SkillPolicyEnforcer, AndroidPermissionGuard), AgentEvent state machine (10 variants), agent_loop, identity anchoring, enhanced skill registry (.md loading). 25 files, 34 tests.

android-ai-agent Phase 3: JNI bridge (5 functions using jni 0.22 EnvUnowned+with_env pattern), memory manager (MEMORY.md), 20 Kotlin files. Cargo.toml configured for Android cdylib. Cross-compiled libagent_core.so (1.3MB, arm64-v8a, NDK r29).

KimiClaw (catcatboy-cyber/KimiClaw) is a Java Android floating pet app. NOT an AI agent but has patterns ported: NotificationListenerService (6-app), WindowManager floating overlay, StateFlow message queue. Our agent has all 3 plus Rust/LLM core, AccessibilityService, Compose UI, skill system, safety enforcement, Keystore.

android-ai-agent uses edition 2021 (not 2024) for Android cross-compilation compatibility. serde_json pinned to 1.0.140 due to nightly Rust regression on aarch64-android target. jni 0.22 uses EnvUnowned+with_env pattern for extern functions, not JNIEnv directly. jboolean needs `as u8` cast on Android.
